title: Infrastructure as Code for Beginners (AWS CDK)
summary: A tutorial video introducing Infrastructure as Code (IaC) concepts by building a serverless REST API on AWS using the Cloud Development Kit (CDK) with Python. The course contrasts manual AWS console setup with CDK automation, covering DynamoDB, Lambda, and API Gateway configuration and deployment.
